title: MPIEMSES3D plasma.toml
description: JSON Schema for MPIEMSES3D TOML input. Top-level groups are strict; individual groups allow additional properties so the schema can be extended incrementally.

$schema.description: Optional editor schema hint. Ignored by MPIEMSES3D.

meta.description: Unit conversion metadata (not read by the Fortran solver).

real.description: Physical constants used by the preprocessor (preinp).

realcv.description: Derived conversion values used by the preprocessor (preinp).

system.description: System-wide control flags and boundary conditions.

species.description: Per-species parameter definitions. Each entry sets parameters for species i across plasma, intp, inp, emissn, digcon, and system groups.

meta_group.description: Unit conversion metadata. Not consumed by the solver; preserved for post-processing and visualization.

unit_conversion.description: Normalization keys that map simulation units to physical units.

dx.description: Grid spacing in physical units [m]. Corresponds to !!key dx=[…] in plasma.inp.

to_c.description: Ratio of physical light speed to normalized light speed (cv): to_c = c_phys / cv.

format_version.description: Input format version. 1 (or absent) = legacy flat-array only. 2 = new-style [[species]], [[ptcond.boundaries]], [[ptcond.objects]] supported.

real_group.description: Physical constants for the preprocessor (preinp). Values here are not read by the solver directly.

realcv_group.description: Derived conversion values for the preprocessor.

cvsim.description: Normalized light speed used in the simulation.

emflag.description: Field solver mode. 0 = Electrostatic (Poisson) — no magnetic field evolution, CFL violations are warnings only. 1 = Full electromagnetic (Maxwell) — CFL condition strictly enforced. 2 = CoToCoA mode.

jobcon_group.description: Job execution control: restart, snapshot, and step count.

jobnum.description: [restart_flag, snapshot_flag]. restart_flag: 0=new, 1=restart from SNAPSHOT0. snapshot_flag: 0=no output, 1=save to SNAPSHOT1.

digcon_group.description: Diagnostic output frequency, range, and format for HDF5 dumps, field maps, and current density.

hdfdigstart.description: Start time step for HDF5 diagnostic output.

hdfdigend.description: End time step for HDF5 diagnostic output.

iediag.description: Energy diagnostic interval [steps]. Negative excludes damping region.

intfoc.description: Main loop diagnostic interval (should be a multiple of mltstp). Default: 128.

ipahdf.description: Per-species field data skip factor for HDF5 output.

ipaxyz.description: Particle data storage options: [x, y, z, vx, vy, vz, id] per species. 1=store, 0=skip.

ifxyz.description: Field data storage options: [ex, ey, ez, bx, by, bz, rho]. 1=store, 0=skip.

ijxyz.description: Current data storage: [ajx, ajy, ajz, phi]. 1=store, 0=skip.

ikxmax.description: Maximum k-space index (x) for spectral diagnostics.

ikymax.description: Maximum k-space index (y) for spectral diagnostics.

ikzmax.description: Maximum k-space index (z) for spectral diagnostics.

plasma_group.description: Fundamental plasma and field parameters in normalized EMSES units.

wp.description: Plasma frequency per species. Indirectly sets plasma density: wp_s = sqrt(n_s q_s^2 / (eps0 m_s)).

wc.description: Electron cyclotron frequency. Sets background magnetic field strength: wc = e B0 / m_e.

gfactor.description: Implicit solver factor (default: 0.5). Controls weighting between old/new time levels.

phixy.description: Azimuthal angle [deg] of the static magnetic field projected onto the x-y plane.

phiz.description: Elevation angle [deg] of the static magnetic field from the z-axis.

rho0.description: Reference charge density (default: -1.0 = auto). Positive value overrides the neutralizing background.

denk.description: Density modulation wave number per species.

tmgrid_group.description: Time step and spatial resolution of the simulation domain.

dt.description: Time step size. Must satisfy stability constraints (wp*dt < 1, wc*dt < 1, CFL for emflag=1).

dtf.description: Field update time step (default: same as dt).

dr.description: Grid spacing. Must be smaller than the local Debye length.

nx.description: Number of grid cells in x.

ny.description: Number of grid cells in y.

nz.description: Number of grid cells in z.

system_group.description: System-wide control flags: species count, boundary conditions, and field masking.

mltstp.description: Number of field update loops per particle push (multiple time step). Default: 1.

juncan.description: Current cancellation option. 0=none, 1=subtract uniform current, 2=no ES + subtract, -2=no ES only, >=1000=test particle mode.

npbnd.description: Particle boundary condition per axis and species. 0=periodic, 1=reflective, 2=free, -1=follow nfbnd.

mtd_vbnd.description: Potential boundary condition per axis [x,y,z]. 0=periodic, 1=Dirichlet, 2=Neumann, 3=open/free-space (doubles FFT grid in that dimension).

imask.description: Field component masking flags [B, E_trans, E_long, J, rho, …]. 1=enabled, 0=masked.

separate_accumulated_and_space_charge.description: If true, compute surface (accumulated) and space charge contributions separately (default: true).

intp_group.description: Particle species attributes, initial placement, and integration parameters in normalized EMSES units.

np.description: Particle buffer size per species. Increase if buffer overflow occurs during emission/injection.

npin.description: Initial macro-particle count per species at startup. Mutually exclusive with dnsf.

path.description: Parallel thermal velocity per species (parallel to B0).

spa.description: Parallel drift velocity in the distribution function (default: 0.0).

peth.description: Perpendicular thermal velocity per species (perpendicular to B0).

f.description: Loss-cone factor (default: 1.0). f=1 with peth=path gives isotropic. 0<f<1 gives loss-cone distribution.

vdx.description: Drift velocity x-component per species (Cartesian alternative to vdri/vdthz/vdthxy).

vpa.description: Minimum of parallel velocity distribution range (default: -16.0).

vpb.description: Maximum of parallel velocity distribution range (default: 16.0).

vpe.description: Maximum of perpendicular velocity distribution range (default: 32.0).

nphi.description: Number of azimuthal bins for velocity distribution diagnostics.

ioptd.description: Particle placement optimization flag per species.

vdri.description: Bulk drift velocity magnitude per species.

vdthz.description: Drift direction zenith angle [deg] per species (0° = +z).

vdthxy.description: Drift direction azimuthal angle [deg] per species (from +x, CCW).

dnsf.description: Particle density scaling factor. Sets how many physical particles are grouped into one macro-particle. Mutually exclusive with npin.

inp_group.description: Particle injection from simulation domain boundaries.

inpf.description: Injection flag at lower x-boundary per species. 0=no injection, 1=inject.

inpb.description: Injection flag at upper x-boundary per species. 0=no injection, 1=inject.

injct.description: Time step interval between continuous injections per species. 0=disable periodic injection.

npr.description: Number of standard-distribution samples for injection particle generation.

ptcond_group.description: Surface, conductor, and inner boundary settings: geometry, potential, subcell, and secondary electron emission.

boundary_type.description: Single-object inner boundary type. Use 'complex' with boundary_types for multiple sub-boundaries.

boundary_types.description: Sub-boundary type list for complex mode.

zssurf.description: Z-coordinate of the ground surface [grid units] (for *-surface and *-hole types).

zsbuf.description: Buffer zone above zssurf where particles are not initially placed.

rcurv.description: Curvature ratio: minimum-to-maximum radius (for hyperboloid-hole, ellipsoid-hole, dent-rectangle-hole).

xlrechole.description: X lower boundary of rectangular hole [grid units].

xurechole.description: X upper boundary of rectangular hole [grid units].

ylrechole.description: Y lower boundary of rectangular hole [grid units].

yurechole.description: Y upper boundary of rectangular hole [grid units].

zlrechole.description: Z lower boundary of rectangular hole [grid units].

zurechole.description: Z upper boundary of rectangular hole [grid units].

rectangle_shape.description: Rectangular plane extents: [xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax] per sub-boundary.

circle_origin.description: Circle center coordinates [x, y, z] per sub-boundary.

cuboid_shape.description: Cuboid extents: [xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, zmin, zmax] per sub-boundary.

sphere_origin.description: Sphere center coordinates [x, y, z] per sub-boundary.

cylinder_origin.description: Cylinder bottom-center coordinates [x, y, z] per sub-boundary.

cylinder_height.description: Cylinder height along its axis per sub-boundary.

disk_origin.description: Annular disk bottom-center coordinates [x, y, z] per sub-boundary.

disk_radius.description: Annular disk outer radius per sub-boundary.

disk_inner_radius.description: Annular disk inner radius per sub-boundary.

mtd_vchg.description: Potential treatment per object. 0=floating (self-consistent), -1=fixed (held at pfixed).

modeww.description: Capacitance matrix mode. |modeww|=1: no capacitance matrix (surface_charge skipped), |modeww|=2: capacitance matrix method, |modeww|=3: distributed capacitance matrix. Sign: >0 ignore charge accumulation, <0 include charge accumulation.

boundary_conductor_id.description: Conductor ID (ipc) associated with each sub-boundary for charge accounting.

max_bounce_count.description: Maximum number of surface bounces per boundary before absorption.

enable_secondary_electron_emission.description: Enable secondary electron emission (SEE) per boundary and species.

boundary_se_model_type.description: SEE yield model type. 0=Whipple (1981) empirical model (energy and angle dependent).

boundary_se_const_yield.description: Constant SEE yield (used when const-yield model is selected).

boundary_se_yield_max.description: Maximum SEE yield delta_max at optimal energy.

boundary_se_energy_max.description: Incident energy E_max [EMSES eV] at which yield = delta_max.

boundary_se_species_id.description: Species ID for emitted secondary electrons (default: 1 = electron).

boundaries.description: Array-of-tables for per-boundary definition. Each entry specifies one boundary with its type and shape parameters. Implies boundary_type = 'complex'.

conductor_groups.description: Named conductor groups. Each key is a group name, value defines electrical properties (mtd_vchg, pfixed).

objects.description: Array of solid/conductor objects. Each entry defines geometry and conductor group membership. npc/npcg/pcgs/ccgs are auto-computed.

sources.description: Array-of-tables for per-source definition. Auto-sets njs from count.

charges.description: Array-of-tables for per-charge definition. Auto-sets ntch from count.

dipole_group.description: Embedded magnetic dipole sources for localized magnetic fields.

sources.description: Array-of-tables for per-dipole definition. Auto-sets nmd from count.

emissn_group.description: Charged particle emission from internal or external surfaces (e.g. photoelectrons, secondary electrons).

decrease_current_according_to_incident_a.description: If true, reduce emission current by cos(incidence angle).

nflag_emit.description: Emission type per species. 0=external (domain boundary), 1=internal (inner surface), 2=internal with ray-casting.

nepl.description: Number of emission planes per species.

curf.description: Base emission current density per species [A/m^2 in EMSES units].

curb.description: Backward emission current density per species.

qpr.description: Reverse emission charge parameter per species.

dnsf.description: Macro-particle division count for emitted particles.

ipcpl.description: Conductor ID coupled to each emission plane for charge conservation.

nemd.description: Emission direction per plane: ±1=x, ±2=y, ±3=z normal. Sign sets positive/negative direction.

xmaxe.description: Upper x-boundary of emission plane [grid units].

xmine.description: Lower x-boundary of emission plane [grid units].

ymaxe.description: Upper y-boundary of emission plane [grid units].

ymine.description: Lower y-boundary of emission plane [grid units].

zmaxe.description: Upper z-boundary of emission plane [grid units].

zmine.description: Lower z-boundary of emission plane [grid units].

pe_ray_cast.description: Enable ray-casting based photoemission. Surface exposure to illumination determines emission area.

periodic_raycast.description: Enable periodic ray-casting (replicate objects in xy-plane for periodic shadows).

max_periodic_shift.description: Maximum horizontal shift for periodic ray-casting replication.

max_boundary_height.description: Maximum vertical height for estimating periodic ray-casting replication count.

emission_start_step.description: Time step to start particle emission.

emission_end_step.description: Time step to stop particle emission.

emission_time_sigma.description: Standard deviation for Gaussian emission time variation.

emission_leave_anti_particle.description: If true, leave an anti-particle at the emission site to maintain charge neutrality (default: true).

planes.description: Array-of-tables for per-plane emission definition. Auto-sets nepl from count.

allOf.description: When pe_ray_cast is true, ray angles are used for photoemission surface determination.

ray_zenith_angle_deg.description: Solar zenith angle [deg] for ray-casting (required when pe_ray_cast=true).

ray_azimuth_angle_deg.description: Solar azimuth angle [deg] for ray-casting (required when pe_ray_cast=true).

allOf.description: When pe_ray_cast is false or absent, explicit emission planes must be defined.

then.description: Explicit emission plane parameters (nepl, nemd, coordinate bounds) should be specified.

nodes.description: Number of MPI process divisions along [x, y, z]. Total processes = nodes[0] * nodes[1] * nodes[2].

verbose_group.description: Verbosity and debug output levels during simulation execution.

EMSES_verbose.description: Main EMSES simulation verbosity level (default: 0). Higher values produce more output.

OHHELP_stats.description: If non-zero, print OHHELP solver performance statistics.

OHHELP_repiter.description: If non-zero, report OHHELP solver iteration counts.

gradema_group.description: Surface charging acceleration (EMA-based gradient method) for faster convergence of surface potential.

coef_start.description: Time-fraction thresholds (relative to nstep) selecting which grad_coef/smooth_coef segment to use.

smooth_coef.description: EMA smoothing coefficient: EMA(t) = (1 - smooth_coef)*EMA(t-1) + smooth_coef*drhobk(t).

grad_coef.description: Charging acceleration coefficient: rhobk(t) = rhobk(t-1) + grad_coef * EMA(t). Default: 1.0.

grad_coef2.description: Secondary gradient coefficient for 'linear' and 'bezier' grad_type modes.

grad_type.description: Gradient mode for spatial variation of charging acceleration.

control_grad_coef.description: Control points for spatially-varying gradient coefficient.

species_entry.description: Parameters for a single particle species (e.g. electron, ion, photoelectron).

dnsf.description: Particle density scaling factor (real). Sets macro-particle grouping.

irhsp.description: Charge density output flag per species.

allOf.description: When nflag_emit > 0 (internal/PE emission), curf should be specified.

boundary_entry.description: A single boundary element with its type and shape parameters.

plane_with_circle_origin.description: Center of circular hole [x, y, z].

boundary_se_energy_max.description: Energy at max SEE yield per species [EMSES eV].

boundary_mirror_reflect_alpha.description: Beckmann roughness parameter for specular reflection per species.

boundary_reversal_reflect_alpha.description: Beckmann roughness parameter for reversal reflection per species.

boundary_mirror_reflect_energy_loss_frac.description: Kinetic energy loss fraction on specular reflection per species.

boundary_reversal_reflect_energy_loss_fr.description: Kinetic energy loss fraction on reversal reflection per species.

boundary_se_model_type.description: SEE yield model type per species. 0=Whipple (1981).

boundary_se_const_yield.description: Constant SEE yield per species (for const-yield model).

boundary_se_species_id.description: Species ID for emitted secondary electrons per species (default: 1).

conductor_group_entry.description: Conductor group definition. Objects assigned to this group share the same electrical potential.

object_entry.description: A solid/conductor object with geometry and conductor group assignment.

conductor.description: Name of the conductor group this object belongs to (must match a key in conductor_groups).

bdycoord.description: Center coordinates [x,y,z] for sphere, or [c1,c2] for cylinder cross-section.

emission_plane_entry.description: An emission plane with direction, spatial bounds, and current parameters.

nemd.description: Emission normal direction: ±1=x, ±2=y, ±3=z. Sign sets positive/negative.

ipcpl.description: Conductor ID coupled to this plane for charge conservation.

xmine.description: Lower x-boundary of emission plane [grid units].

xmaxe.description: Upper x-boundary of emission plane [grid units].

ymine.description: Lower y-boundary of emission plane [grid units].

ymaxe.description: Upper y-boundary of emission plane [grid units].

zmine.description: Lower z-boundary of emission plane [grid units].

zmaxe.description: Upper z-boundary of emission plane [grid units].

curfs.description: Forward emission current density for this plane.

curbs.description: Backward emission current density for this plane.

dnsfs.description: Forward macro-particle division for this plane.

dnsbs.description: Backward macro-particle division for this plane.

rtch.description: Position [x, y, z] in grid coordinates.

rcutoff.description: Cutoff radius to prevent singularity at charge center.
